name: Greenmount Loan and Jewelry
description_short: Baltimore pawn shop offering jewelry, watches, musical instruments, and collateral-based loans since 1987. Buy, sell, or pawn items including fine jewelry, electronics, and tools.
description_long:
Greenmount Loan & Jewelry has operated as a pawn shop in Baltimore, Maryland since 1987. The company positions itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional retail jewelry stores, emphasizing customer service and fair dealing. Over three decades, they have built a reputation centered on staff expertise and customer satisfaction as core business principles.

The company's primary services include buying and selling used jewelry, watches, musical instruments, electronics, tools, and gold items. They operate an in-house jewelry repair department staffed by a Master Jeweler who handles repairs and custom jewelry design. They also offer collateral-based loans (pawn loans), though specific loan terms, interest rates, and APRs are not disclosed on their website. As an authorized Citizen watch dealer, they sell new timepieces alongside their secondhand inventory.

Greenmount differentiates itself through claims of offering jewelry at discounts up to 70% below retail prices, on-site custom jewelry design services, and emphasis on customer service over transaction volume. Their stated business philosophy prioritizes paying above-market rates when buying items and treating customers with respect. The Master Jeweler specialization and jewelry repair capabilities are highlighted as competitive advantages over typical pawn shops.

Potential customers should note that while the website emphasizes jewelry selection and retail resale, actual pawn loan terms—including APR, repayment periods, and fees—are not detailed online. Interested borrowers will need to visit in person or call (410) 243-3311 to understand loan costs. Operating hours are limited to Monday-Saturday, 10am-5pm, which may not accommodate all schedules. The company's primary value proposition is as a jewelry retailer and repair shop rather than as a primary lending source.
pros: Established since 1987 with stated focus on customer service and staff expertise
In-house Master Jeweler for jewelry repair and custom design services
Claims jewelry prices up to 70% below retail store prices
Authorized Citizen brand watch dealer offering new timepieces
Buys multiple item categories including jewelry, gold, watches, instruments, electronics, and tools
Inventory-based retail model allows browsing before transactions
cons: Pawn loan terms, APR, fees, and repayment periods not disclosed on website—must inquire in person
Limited operating hours (Mon-Sat 10am-5pm) restrict access for working customers
No online inventory system or remote browsing of available items for loan eligibility
Website does not explain pawn loan process, qualification criteria, or documentation requirements
Single physical location in Baltimore limits accessibility for non-local customers
best_for: Jewelry buyers seeking discounted prices on secondhand fine jewelry and watches
Customers needing jewelry repair or custom design services from a skilled jeweler
Sellers of used musical instruments, electronics, tools, or jewelry looking for fair buyout prices
Borrowers with valuable collateral (jewelry, watches, instruments) seeking short-term secured loans
diagnosis: Greenmount Loan & Jewelry is best for customers seeking to buy discounted jewelry, access jewelry repair and custom design, or quickly obtain loans using jewelry and other valuables as collateral. Primary caveat: actual pawn loan terms and APRs are not published online, requiring in-person visits to understand borrowing costs and eligibility—this is not a transparent lending option for price comparison.
services: Pawn loans using jewelry, watches, and other items as collateral
Purchase of used jewelry, gold, and watches
Sale of used and secondhand jewelry inventory
Purchase and resale of used musical instruments
Purchase and resale of used electronics and tools
New Citizen brand watch sales (authorized dealer)
meta_description: Greenmount Loan & Jewelry in Baltimore buys, sells, and pawns jewelry, watches, instruments, and electronics since 1987.
